zh.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Beaumont是Robert de Beaumont 2nd Lord of Leicester和Amice De Gael Heiress Of Breteuil的女兒，於大約1121年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾。她和Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northampton至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1197年4月24日在英國萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Beaumont是Robert de Beaumont 2nd Lord of Leicester和Amice De Gael Heiress Of Breteuil的女儿，于大约1121年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾。她和Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northampton至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1197年4月24日在英国萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beaumont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Gilles, Gaetan, Honore, Jacques, Jean-Guy, Marcel.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the five places in Normandy or several others elsewhere in France so named. The placename comes from Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + mont ‘hill’. There are also places in England so named under Norman influence in Cumberland, Lancashire, and Essex, the last of which changed its name in the 12th century from Fulepet ‘foul pit’ to Bealmont ‘beautiful hill’; these may also have given rise to the surname. The surname is now widespread throughout England, but most common in Yorkshire. Compare Belmont .

History: Many English bearers of this surname are descended from Henry de Beaumont (died 1340), who came to England from France as a soldier, serving Kings Edward I, II, and III of England. He acquired the earldom of Buchan in Scotland by marriage. — Many American bearers of this surname are descendants of John Beaumont (1612–47), who came to North America from England in 1630. William Beaumont came from England to Cambridge MA in 1635 and subsequently moved to CT.

variants.name: Bement
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire): variant of   Beaumont  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Beeman
meanings: English (Kent): occupational name for a beekeeper, from Middle English bee-man ‘bee-keeper’ (Old English bēo + mann).
English (Kent): variant of   Beaumont  .
Americanized form of German Biemann or of its Dutch cognate Bieman.

variants.name: Belmont
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beaumont  .
Catalan: habitational name from the placename Bellmont ‘beautiful mountain’. Compare Spanish   Belmonte  .

variants.name: Baumunk
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Siegmund.
German: probably a Germanized form of a French Huguenot name Beaumont (see also Beaumont ).

variants.name: Bayman
meanings: English (mainly Lancashire): variant of   Beaumont  .
Americanized form of German Beumann or Bäumann, variants of Baumann .

nameMeanings.name: Isabelle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isabel
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Beaumont was born about 1121, in Leicestershire, England as the daughter of Robert de Beaumont 2nd Lord of Leicester and Amice De Gael Heiress Of Breteuil. She had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northampton. She died on 24 April 1197, in Leicester, Leicestershire, England, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Beaumont est née environ 1121, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, fille de Robert de Beaumont 2nd Lord of Leicester et Amice De Gael Heiress Of Breteuil. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northampton. Elle est décédée le 24 avril 1197, à Leicester, Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Beaumont wurde um 1121 in Leicestershire, England, als Tochter von Robert de Beaumont 2nd Lord of Leicester und Amice De Gael Heiress Of Breteuil geboren. Sie hatte mit Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northampton mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 24. April 1197 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Leicester, Leicestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Beaumont è nata il circa 1121 nel Leicestershire, England come figlia di Robert de Beaumont 2nd Lord of Leicester e Amice De Gael Heiress Of Breteuil. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northampton. Morì il 24 aprile 1197, nel Leicester, Leicestershire, England, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Beaumontは約1121年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアでRobert de Beaumont 2nd Lord of LeicesterとAmice De Gael Heiress Of Breteuilの娘として生まれた。彼女はSimon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northamptonとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1197年4月24日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアレアイセスターで77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Beaumont(은)는 대략 1121년 영국 레이스스터실르에서 Robert de Beaumont 2nd Lord of Leicester(와)과 Amice De Gael Heiress Of Breteuil의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northampton(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1197년 4월 24일 영국 레이스스터실르 레이스스터에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Beaumont nasceu aproximadamente 1121, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra filha de Robert de Beaumont 2nd Lord of Leicester e Amice De Gael Heiress Of Breteuil. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northampton. Ela faleceu em 24 de abril de 1197, em Leicester, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Beaumont родилась около 1121 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия. Её родителей звали Robert de Beaumont 2nd Lord of Leicester и Amice De Gael Heiress Of Breteuil. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northampton. Она умерла 24 апреля 1197 г. в местности лисестир, лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 77 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Beaumont nació aproximadamente 1121, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra como hija de Robert de Beaumont 2nd Lord of Leicester y Amice De Gael Heiress Of Breteuil. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northampton. Murió el 24 de abril de 1197, en Leicester, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 77 años.
